description: 今日 AI 开源领域呈现 **"Agent 基础设施深化"** 与 **"垂直场景爆发"** 双主线：MCP 协议生态持续扩张，[claude-context](https://github.com/zilliztech/claude-context) 以 871 日增星登顶 Trending，标志着代码 Agent 的上下文工程进入新阶段；同时，金融、舆情、短视频、网络安全等垂直领域 AI 应用密集涌现，[FinceptTerminal](https://github.com/Fincept-Corporation/FinceptTerminal) 单日获星 1772 创今日峰值。RAG 赛道出现 **"去向量化"** 创新信号，[PageIndex](https://github.com/VectifyAI/PageIndex) 的 reasoning-based RAG 与 [LEANN](https://github.com/yichuan-w/LEANN) 的 97% 存储压缩技术挑战传统向量数据库范式。

**MCP 协议成为 Agent 基础设施的事实标准**。今日 Trending 中 [claude-context](https://github.com/zilliztech/claude-context)、[TrendRadar](https://github.com/sansan0/TrendRadar) 均明确支持 MCP 架构，主题搜索中 [activepieces](https://github.com/activepieces/activepieces) 集成约 400 个 MCP 服务器，表明 Anthropic 主导的 Model Context Protocol 正从 Claude 生态扩展为跨平台 Agent 互操作标准。
| [HKUDS/nanobot](https://github.com/HKUDS/nanobot) | ⭐40,538 | "超轻量级个人 AI Agent"，香港大学数据科学团队出品，边缘设备上的 Agent 轻量化代表 |

wanman is an open-source agent matrix runtime inspired by Japanese one-man trains. It lets human users step back into an observer role while local agent runtimes coordinate autonomous multi-agent workflows, task execution, and artifacts.

🦔 PostHog is an all-in-one developer platform for building successful products. We offer product analytics, web analytics, session replay, error tracking, feature flags, experimentation, surveys, data warehouse, a CDP, and an AI product assistant to help debug your code, ship features faster, and keep all your usage and customer data in one stack.
Browser Harness | Self-healing harness that enables LLMs to complete any task.
A collection of DESIGN.md files inspired by popular brand design systems. Drop one into your project and let coding agents generate a matching UI.

GitNexus: The Zero-Server Code Intelligence Engine -       GitNexus is a client-side knowledge graph creator that runs entirely in your browser. Drop in a GitHub repo or ZIP file, and get an interactive knowledge graph wit a built in Graph RAG Agent. Perfect for code exploration
🤖 A minimal and customizable Docker image running the Android emulator as a service.

A polyglot document intelligence framework with a Rust core. Extract text, metadata, images, and structured information from PDFs, Office documents, images, and 97+ formats. Available for Rust, Python, Ruby, Java, Go, PHP, Elixir, C#, R, C, TypeScript (Node/Bun/Wasm/Deno)- or use via CLI, REST API, or MCP server.
